flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bryn Mawr College rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($32.2k → $38.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bryn Mawr College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.3k → $65.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bryn Mawr College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (81.0% → 70.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bryn Mawr College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
